Title: Rename Category with a valid name
Objective: Verify functionality for doi ten category (Category) khi enter ten moi hop le.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Training Materials Management interface.
Steps:
1. Nhap select category "IT".
2. Nhap nut "Rename" (Rename).
3. Enter ten moi la "Information Technology".
4. Nhap "Save" (Save).
ExpectedResult:
System display notification cap nhat successfully.
Ten category duoc thay doi thanh "Information Technology" tren interface.
Cac course ben trong category van giu nguyen.

Title: Category rename fails due to empty name
Objective: Verify system bao error va ngan chan viec doi ten category thanh rong.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Rename Category interface.
Steps:
1. Delete toan bo noi dung trong o enter ten category.
2. Nhap nut "Save" (Save).
ExpectedResult:
System display notification error requires enter ten category (e.g.: "Category Name is required.").
Ten category cu khong bi thay doi.
Notes: Related to Validation Rules (Section 8), Error Handling (Section 9)

Title: Verify Archive and Delete functions are not supported for Category

Title: Enter CSV - Cap nhat thong tin Session da ton tai

Steps:
1. Select course "Java Programming".
2. Nhap select "Enter CSV" (Import CSV).
3. Upload file CSV chua du lieu cap nhat cho ID "S001".
4. Nhap "Xac nhan".
ExpectedResult:
System display notification enter du lieu successfully.
Bai hoc co ID "S001" duoc cap nhat successfully voi ten "OOP Basics", so bai "1", mo ta "Gioi thieu huong doi tuong".
Cac tai lieu dinh kem truoc do cua session nay van duoc giu nguyen.
